description: M17 sample external scenario bundle. Demonstrates manifest layout, golden borders, license lineage, and contribution checklist fields for community PRs.
author: Global Province Map contributors
source_lineage: Illustrative community overrides for demo provinces only

scenarios.notes: Tiny demo overlay for sample WE province IDs.

deprecation.policy: When scaffold province IDs change, republish a new bundle_id (or bump a version suffix) and list this bundle under superseded_by. Do not silently rewrite historical tags in place for consumers who pinned a bundle.
deprecation.notes: Community bundles should pin the scaffold they were authored against.

checklist.notes: Illustrative self-attestation for the sample bundle.

notes: Not an official era. Use as a template for external curator datasets.
